<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update task key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/tasks/{taskNumber}/keys/{keyId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Mark key as done, which updates task progress.
